mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, contact_id, contact_name, contact_avatar, created_at, updated_at FROM user_message_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT sender_id AS senderId, content FROM user_messages WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{contactId}) OR (sender_id = #{contactId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, user_id, contact_id, created_at, updated_at FROM user_message_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND contact_id = #{contactId}
SELECT id, user_id, contact_id, contact_name, contact_avatar, created_at, updated_at FROM user_message_sessions WHERE contact_id = #{contactId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_message_sessions (user_id, user_name, user_avatar, contact_id, contact_name, contact_avatar, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{userAvatar}, #{contactId}, #{contactName}, #{contactAvatar}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_name = VALUES(user_name), user_avatar = VALUES(user_avatar), contact_name = VALUES(contact_name), contact_avatar = VALUES(contact_avatar), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
INSERT INTO user_message_sessions ( user_id, contact_id, contact_name, contact_avatar ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{contactId}, #{contactName}, #{contactAvatar} )
